buster.updates: deb http://deb.debian.org/debian/ buster-updates main contrib non-free

bullseye.updates: deb http://deb.debian.org/debian/ bullseye-updates main contrib non-free non-free-firmware
bullseye.security: deb http://security.debian.org/debian-security bullseye-security main contrib non-free non-free-firmware

bookworm.updates: deb http://deb.debian.org/debian/ bookworm-updates main contrib non-free non-free-firmware
bookworm.security: deb http://security.debian.org/debian-security bookworm-security main contrib non-free non-free-firmware
bookworm.backports: deb http://deb.debian.org/debian/ bookworm-backports main contrib non-free non-free-firmware

trixie.updates: deb http://deb.debian.org/debian/ trixie-updates main contrib non-free non-free-firmware
trixie.security: deb http://security.debian.org/debian-security trixie-security main contrib non-free non-free-firmware
trixie.backports: deb http://deb.debian.org/debian/ trixie-backports main contrib non-free non-free-firmware

bionic.updates: deb http://archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu/ bionic-updates main restricted universe multiverse
bionic.security: deb http://security.ubuntu.com/ubuntu/ bionic-security main restricted universe multiverse
bionic.backports: deb http://archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu/ bionic-backports main restricted universe multiverse

focal.updates: deb http://archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu/ focal-updates main restricted universe multiverse
focal.security: deb http://security.ubuntu.com/ubuntu/ focal-security main restricted universe multiverse
focal.backports: deb http://archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu/ focal-backports main restricted universe multiverse

jammy.updates: deb http://archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu/ jammy-updates main restricted universe multiverse
jammy.security: deb http://security.ubuntu.com/ubuntu/ jammy-security main restricted universe multiverse
jammy.backports: deb http://archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu/ jammy-backports main restricted universe multiverse

noble.updates: deb http://archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu/ noble-updates main restricted universe multiverse
noble.security: deb http://security.ubuntu.com/ubuntu/ noble-security main restricted universe multiverse
noble.backports: deb http://archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu/ noble-backports main restricted universe multiverse

aliyun.debian: deb http://mirrors.aliyun.com/debian/ $release main contrib non-free non-free-firmware
aliyun.debian-updates: deb http://mirrors.aliyun.com/debian/ $release-updates main contrib non-free non-free-firmware
aliyun.debian-backports: deb http://mirrors.aliyun.com/debian/ $release-backports main contrib non-free non-free-firmware
aliyun.ubuntu: deb http://mirrors.aliyun.com/ubuntu/ $codename main restricted universe multiverse
aliyun.ubuntu-updates: deb http://mirrors.aliyun.com/ubuntu/ $codename-updates main restricted universe multiverse
aliyun.ubuntu-security: deb http://mirrors.aliyun.com/ubuntu/ $codename-security main restricted universe multiverse
aliyun.ubuntu-backports: deb http://mirrors.aliyun.com/ubuntu/ $codename-backports main restricted universe multiverse

ustc.debian: deb https://mirrors.ustc.edu.cn/debian/ $release main contrib non-free non-free-firmware
ustc.debian-updates: deb https://mirrors.ustc.edu.cn/debian/ $release-updates main contrib non-free non-free-firmware
ustc.debian-backports: deb https://mirrors.ustc.edu.cn/debian/ $release-backports main contrib non-free non-free-firmware
ustc.ubuntu: deb https://mirrors.ustc.edu.cn/ubuntu/ $codename main restricted universe multiverse
ustc.ubuntu-updates: deb https://mirrors.ustc.edu.cn/ubuntu/ $codename-updates main restricted universe multiverse
ustc.ubuntu-security: deb https://mirrors.ustc.edu.cn/ubuntu/ $codename-security main restricted universe multiverse
ustc.ubuntu-backports: deb https://mirrors.ustc.edu.cn/ubuntu/ $codename-backports main restricted universe multiverse
